title: Corrective fix for B-aa3e7707-test: Test Fix remaining 'orchestrator' references in CLI output and onboarding
description:
Blocked reason: src/agent_takt/tui.py:1542 still contains self.title = \"Orchestrator TUI\", a user-visible TUI window title not changed by the developer bead. Requires a production code fix outside tester scope.

Remaining work: One user-visible string was missed by the developer: src/agent_takt/tui.py:1542 self.title = \"Orchestrator TUI\" — the TUI window title bar, visible to users. Requires a production code fix in a new developer bead.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-aa3e7707-test.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.

conflict_risks: None. Test-only changes, no overlap with other beads.
